title: hellenia borneensis
intro: Hellenia borneensis, also known as Hellia borneensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Borneo region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Hellenia borneensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Hellenia borneensis can be found in various forms, including tea, powder, and extract, and are often used to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
